observe: Not every deadline here is a suggestion. Miss a hard one, and it's not late — it's wrong.
fault: A soft deadline cut in front of a hard one. The hard deadline just passed, unmet. That's not recoverable.
repair: Reorder it. Hard deadlines go first, every time.
escape: No slack left. Protect the hard deadline above everything else.

observe: Real-time scheduling distinguishes hard deadlines from soft deadlines.
fault: A hard deadline was missed due to scheduling order.
repair: Prioritize hard-deadline processes over soft-deadline processes.
escape: Complete the schedule without missing a hard deadline.

hints: A missed soft deadline degrades quality; a missed hard deadline is a failure.
